description: Fix test mocks to match real openclaw --json behavior (writes to stderr) so stdout/stderr bugs are caught in CI

userStories.title: Fix tc-039: mock openclaw writes to stderr like real openclaw
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tc-039 to catch the stdout/stderr bug that was missed previously.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/integration/tc-039.test.ts, update the mock openclaw shell script to write JSON to stderr instead of stdout
The mock script should be: #!/bin/sh\ncat > /dev/null\necho '{"payloads":[{"text":"mock response","mediaUrl":null}]}' >&2
The test assertion for the response body should still pass (the message-server now reads from stderr)
All existing tc-039 tests still pass
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: File: tests/integration/tc-039.test.ts. The mock openclaw binary is created with chmodSync in beforeAll. Find the line that creates the mock script content and change `echo '{...}'` to `echo '{...}' >&2`. The message-server.js now reads from stderr (fixed in PR #21), so the test should pass once the mock matches.

userStories.title: Fix message-delivery e2e test: use real message-server.js with mock openclaw
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the message-delivery e2e test to exercise the real message-server.js code path (not a mocked container endpoint) so stdout/stderr bugs are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/e2e/message-delivery.test.ts, replace the mock container HTTP server with a test that spawns the real message-server.js with a mock openclaw binary injected via PATH
The mock openclaw binary writes JSON to stderr: echo '{"payloads":[{"text":"Hello from agent","mediaUrl":null}]}' >&2
The test starts the real message-server.js (from docker/tenant-image/message-server.js) on a test port using node with a modified PATH env containing the mock openclaw
The test sets RELAY_TOKEN env for the message-server process
The test hits POST /message on the message-server and verifies it returns { ok: true, response: 'Hello from agent' }
The existing full relay→CP→container mock chain test can remain as-is OR be updated to use the real message-server — do whatever is cleanest
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: The real message-server.js is at docker/tenant-image/message-server.js. Spawn it with: spawn('node', [MESSAGE_SERVER_PATH], { env: { ...process.env, PATH: mockBinDir + ':' + process.env.PATH, RELAY_TOKEN: 'test-token', HOME: tmpDir } }). Use the same pattern as tc-039 for creating the mock openclaw binary. The message-server listens on PORT env var (default 3100). Use a random test port. Pattern reference: tests/integration/tc-039.test.ts for spawning message-server.js with mock openclaw.
